error.404_desc: It seems like the page you're looking for does not exist or might have been removed.
error.500_desc: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again later.
error.maintenance_desc: The site is not available at the moment. We'll be back online shortly.
error.unauthorised_title: Oops! You don't have permission to access this page.
error.unauthorised_desc: It looks like you tried to access a resource that requires proper authentication. Please log in with the appropriate credentials.
